home.subtitle: Offline Note Network
home.howItWorksFooter: OLNs works without WiFi, cellular, or any infrastructure. Pure peer-to-peer mesh networking.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.description: Write a note and broadcast it onto the mesh. No internet needed — your message travels over Bluetooth.

propagate.title: Propagate
propagate.description: Nearby devices automatically pick up and relay your note, carrying it further across the mesh with each hop.

persist.title: Persist
persist.description: Notes live on the network independently. Even after you leave, your message continues traveling through devices in the area.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Open the feed to see notes from the mesh around you, from people nearby, or messages that have traveled through many hands to reach you.

encrypt.title: Encrypt
encrypt.description: Add a password while composing to lock a note. Title and body encrypt on-device before broadcast — peers see a locked card until they enter it. There is no recovery, so share the password separately.

compose.title: Compose
compose.encryptToggle: Encrypt this note with a password
